description: Nintendo's flagship franchise and the best-selling video game series of all time. Mario has appeared in over 200 games across every Nintendo platform since 1981, spanning platformers, RPGs, kart racers, sports titles, party games, and one truly cursed live-action film.

media.title: Donkey Kong
media.description: Mario's debut — then called 'Jumpman' — rescuing Pauline from a rampaging ape.
media.notes: MAME core. Origin of Mario.

media.title: Mario Bros.
media.description: Introduces Luigi and establishes the Mario Bros. as a plumber duo fighting creatures in the sewers.
media.notes: NES core: fceumm

media.title: Super Mario Bros.
media.description: The game that defined the platformer genre — Bowser kidnaps Peach, Mario runs right.
media.notes: NES core: fceumm. The one that started it all.

media.title: Super Mario Bros.: The Lost Levels
media.description: Japan-only sequel (SMB2 JP) — brutally difficult, designed to punish mastery of the original.
media.notes: NES core: fceumm. Released in the West as part of Super Mario All-Stars.

media.title: Super Mario Bros. 2
media.description: Western SMB2 — a reskin of Doki Doki Panic featuring four playable characters with distinct move sets.
media.notes: NES core: fceumm. Non-canon dream sequence, technically.

media.title: Super Mario Bros. 3
media.description: One of the greatest platformers ever made — power-ups, world maps, Koopalings, and the Tanooki Suit.
media.notes: NES core: fceumm. ⭐ Essential.

media.title: Super Mario Land
media.description: First Mario on handheld — rescues Princess Daisy across Egyptian, Chinese, and alien-themed worlds.
media.notes: GB core: gambatte

media.title: Super Mario World
media.description: SNES launch title — introduces Yoshi and features the most expansive 2D Mario world to that point.
media.notes: SNES core: snes9x. ⭐ Essential.

media.title: Super Mario Land 2: 6 Golden Coins
media.description: Introduces Wario as the main villain — a massive improvement over the first Land.
media.notes: GB core: gambatte

media.title: Super Mario All-Stars
media.description: Remastered collection of the four NES Mario games with 16-bit graphics and save states.
media.notes: SNES core: snes9x. Includes Lost Levels for Western players.

media.title: Super Mario World 2: Yoshi's Island
media.description: Yoshi must escort Baby Mario to reunite with Baby Luigi — gorgeous crayon-drawn aesthetic, inventive gameplay.
media.notes: SNES core: snes9x. ⭐ Essential. Prequel set before Mario's birth.

media.title: Super Mario 64
media.description: Defined 3D platforming — 120 Power Stars, a living castle, and movement that still holds up.
media.notes: N64 core: mupen64plus_next. ⭐ Essential. PC-preferred for widescreen.

media.title: Super Mario Bros. Deluxe
media.description: GBC port of SMB1 with bonus challenges, Lost Levels content, and a versus mode.
media.notes: GBC core: gambatte

media.title: Paper Mario
media.description: Turn-based RPG in a flat paper world — expanded on Super Mario RPG's template with richer writing.
media.notes: N64 core: mupen64plus_next. ⭐ Essential. Best entry in the Paper Mario sub-series.

media.title: Super Mario Advance
media.description: GBA port of Super Mario Bros. 2 with voiced characters and quality-of-life improvements.
media.notes: GBA core: mgba

media.title: Super Mario World: Super Mario Advance 2
media.description: GBA port of Super Mario World — adds Luigi as a playable character with distinct physics.
media.notes: GBA core: mgba

media.title: Yoshi's Island: Super Mario Advance 3
media.description: GBA port of Yoshi's Island with new bonus levels and slightly altered visuals.
media.notes: GBA core: mgba

media.title: Super Mario Bros. 3: Super Mario Advance 4
media.description: GBA port of SMB3 with e-Reader level support and Luigi as a fully playable character.
media.notes: GBA core: mgba

media.title: Super Mario Sunshine
media.description: Mario cleans up Isle Delfino with FLUDD, a water jetpack — divisive but charming and unique.
media.notes: GameCube — Dolphin on PC required. Stream via Sunshine.

media.title: Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door
media.description: Widely considered the best Paper Mario game — deep RPG combat, witty writing, memorable partners.
media.notes: GameCube — Dolphin on PC required. ⭐ Essential. Remaster also available on Switch.

media.title: New Super Mario Bros.
media.description: The first new 2D Mario in years — reintroduced the formula to a new generation on the DS.
media.notes: NDS core: melonds

media.title: Super Mario Galaxy
media.description: Mario runs across tiny spherical planets in outer space — breathtaking design and an iconic orchestral score.
media.notes: Wii — Dolphin on PC required. Stream via Sunshine. ⭐ Essential.

media.title: New Super Mario Bros. Wii
media.description: Four-player simultaneous co-op 2D Mario — chaotic and excellent with friends.
media.notes: Wii — Dolphin on PC required. Stream via Sunshine.

media.title: Super Mario Galaxy 2
media.description: More Galaxy — Yoshi joins, worlds get even more inventive, some argue it surpasses the original.
media.notes: Wii — Dolphin on PC required. Stream via Sunshine. ⭐ Essential.

media.title: Super Mario 3D Land
media.description: First 3D Mario designed for handheld play — tight, linear levels that bridge 2D and 3D styles.
media.notes: 3DS — Citra on PC required. Stream via Sunshine.

media.title: New Super Mario Bros. 2
media.description: Coin-collecting focused NSMB entry — inoffensive but the weakest of the NSMB line.
media.notes: 3DS — Citra on PC required.

media.title: New Super Mario Bros. U
media.description: The most polished NSMB entry — HD at last, challenging, and packed with content including New Super Luigi U.
media.notes: WiiU — Cemu on PC required. Stream via Sunshine.

media.title: Super Mario 3D World
media.description: Four-player 3D Mario with cat suits and inventive co-op — criminally underplayed on the WiiU.
media.notes: WiiU — Cemu on PC required. Stream via Sunshine. Remaster also on Switch with Bowser's Fury.

media.title: Super Mario Maker
media.description: Create and share levels using four classic Mario styles — the online community was enormous.
media.notes: WiiU — Cemu on PC required. Online servers since shut down.

media.title: Super Mario Run
media.description: Nintendo's first mobile Mario — auto-running with one-tap jumping. Solid, but not essential.
media.notes: Mobile only. iOS/Android.

media.title: Super Mario Odyssey
media.description: Mario captures enemies with his hat Cappy across lavish real-world-inspired kingdoms — pure joy.
media.notes: Switch — Yuzu/Ryujinx on PC required. Stream via Sunshine. ⭐ Essential.

media.title: Super Mario Maker 2
media.description: Expanded sequel to Mario Maker with Super Mario 3D World assets and a proper story mode.
media.notes: Switch — Yuzu/Ryujinx on PC required.

media.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
media.description: The most inventive 2D Mario in decades — Wonder Flowers transform every level unpredictably.
media.notes: Switch — Yuzu/Ryujinx on PC required. ⭐ Essential. Best 2D Mario since the SNES era.

media.title: The Super Mario Bros. Super Show!
media.description: Live-action framing segments with Lou Albano as Mario wrap around animated cartoon episodes loosely based on SMB1 and SMB2.
media.notes: Non-canon campy nostalgia. The "Do the Mario" end-credits dance is genuinely iconic.

media.title: The Adventures of Super Mario Bros. 3
media.description: Cartoon tie-in to SMB3 — the Koopalings get names and personalities, aired alongside the game's North American launch.
media.notes: Non-canon. Better than the Super Show.

media.title: Super Mario World (TV Series)
media.description: SMW cartoon — introduces cave people and Yoshi, runs parallel to the SNES game's setting.
media.notes: Non-canon. Final DiC Mario cartoon.

media.title: Super Mario Bros. (1993 Live Action)
media.description: Bob Hoskins and John Leguizamo star as the Mario brothers in a dystopian fungal Blade Runner knock-off where Bowser is Dennis Hopper in a suit. It is absolutely not a good film.
media.notes: ⚠️ TERRIBLE. Non-canon. A fascinating disaster — both lead actors publicly stated they hated making it. Watch it as a curiosity or don't. Jellyfin.

media.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie (2023)
media.description: Illumination's animated film — visually spectacular, fan-service heavy, and exactly what the franchise deserved after 1993.
media.notes: ✅ Recommended. Jellyfin. A genuine redemption arc for Mario on the big screen.
